HERMITMOD-HERMIT2_EPOCH.title: The Stranger
HERMITMOD-HERMIT2_EPOCH.description:
A figure appeared at the edge of town, hat pulled low, revolver glinting in the fading light.

No one knew where they came from. No one asked. The townsfolk had learned long ago that some questions are better left unspoken.

But the creatures of the Spire took notice. Something about this wanderer unsettled them — a coldness that had nothing to do with the wind.
HERMITMOD-HERMIT3_EPOCH.title: Old Debts
HERMITMOD-HERMIT3_EPOCH.description:
The Hermit moved through the twisted corridors like a ghost, each step deliberate, each shadow familiar.

They had been here before — or somewhere like it. The Spire had a way of dredging up the past. Old faces in the dark. Old debts that refused to stay buried.

The revolver grew warm in their grip. It remembered too.
HERMITMOD-HERMIT4_EPOCH.title: The Reckoning
HERMITMOD-HERMIT4_EPOCH.description:
At the summit, the air thinned and the shadows deepened. The Hermit stood alone against what waited there — something ancient, something hungry.

The final shot echoed through the hollow chambers of the Spire. Then silence.

The Hermit holstered their weapon and turned away. The Spire groaned behind them, but they did not look back. They never did.
HERMITMOD-HERMIT5_EPOCH.title: Marked Prey
HERMITMOD-HERMIT5_EPOCH.description:
Word spread among the Spire's elite — the ones who fancied themselves predators. A lone gunslinger was cutting through the lower floors, methodical and relentless.

They sent their strongest to intercept. One by one, the hunters became the hunted.

The Hermit collected no trophies. Left no calling cards. Only silence where there had been snarling.
HERMITMOD-HERMIT5_EPOCH.unlockInfo: Defeat 15 elite enemies as The Hermit.
HERMITMOD-HERMIT6_EPOCH.title: No Masters
HERMITMOD-HERMIT6_EPOCH.description:
The bosses of the Spire ruled their domains with ancient authority. They had broken countless adventurers, bent them, consumed them.

The Hermit was not like the others. There was no fear to exploit, no ambition to corrupt. Only the steady click of a hammer being drawn back.

One by one, the thrones of the Spire fell empty.
HERMITMOD-HERMIT7_EPOCH.title: Beyond the Veil
HERMITMOD-HERMIT7_EPOCH.description:
The Spire tightened its grip. The corridors grew narrower, the enemies more vicious, the darkness more absolute.

But the Hermit had walked darker roads. Had faced worse than anything stone and malice could conjure.

When the final echo faded and the dust settled, the Hermit stood where no wanderer was meant to stand — beyond the veil, where even the Spire's reach faltered.
